statement: In every magma, Equation 89 (`x = y * (z * (y * w))`) implies Equation 2931 (`x = ((y * (x * z)) * w) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0406
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op y w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x z)) w) x)
